title: Midnight Crisp Algerian Chicken Wrap
description: Savory, highprotein chicken wrapped in spicy bhuna and crisp pita, perfect for a midnight craving.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large skillet over medium‑high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds, stirring constantly.
Stir in the paprika, cumin, coriander, cayenne, salt, and black pepper; cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chicken strips and cook, stirring, until the chicken is browned and cooked through, about 6‑7 minutes.
Fold in the tomato paste and pour in a splash of water (about 2 tablespoons) to make a thin sauce; simmer for 2 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly.
Stir in the Greek yogurt to create a creamy coating; cook for another 1 minute, ensuring the chicken is well coated.
Warm the pita breads in a dry skillet or microwave for about 20 seconds.
Divide the chicken mixture between the two pita breads.
Top each wrap with chopped fresh coriander and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Fold the pita over the filling, roll tightly, and serve immediately.
